Partnership Opportunity
An Unrivalled Six Nations Experience
IRELAND
VS ENGLAND
2027
5th – 7th February  |  Hosted by Geordan Murphy

A Partnership with Purpose

Secure a Headline Partnership for a money-can't-buy experience. Join Rugby Legend Geordan Murphy for an extraordinary weekend in Dublin, while driving meaningful funds towards the Matt Hampson Foundation and vital MND support services.

Why Partner With Us

Elite High-Net-Worth Network

Direct access to a curated audience of 50+ C-Suite and HNW guests in an intimate, multi-day setting spanning a private jet and a 5-star Dublin hotel. The kind of relationship-building that simply can't be bought through conventional sponsorship.

National PR & Digital Footprint

Leverage the narrative of a Six Nations pilgrimage hosted by a genuine rugby legend. Partners benefit from social media integration, co-branded content assets, and exclusive behind-the-scenes access across the full weekend.

Total Brand Immersion

Position your brand as lead partner across all communications: jet livery options, branded welcome collateral, pre-match Q&A hosting, private dinner co-branding. Maximum strategic ROI in a setting your guests will genuinely remember.

Authentic CSR Alignment

Join one of the most respected causes in sport. A portion of every ticket directly funds the Matt Hampson Foundation, with a target of raising £20,000. Your brand stands alongside something that genuinely matters.

Your Host

Geordan Murphy

72 Ireland Caps  |  British & Irish Lion
2009 Grand Slam Winner

Geordan brings a rare combination of elite pedigree and genuine warmth. Not just a rugby legend on stage for a Q&A, but a host who is present and engaged throughout the entire weekend. Our Rome guests rated time with the host as the standout highlight of the trip. Geordan brings that same energy to Dublin.

Weekend Itinerary
Friday
5 Feb

10:00 Depart Harrods Private Terminal, Stansted

15:00 Check-in: The Dean Dublin

17:00 Private dinner at FIRE Steakhouse, Dawson St

20:10 Kick-off: IRE v ENG, Aviva Stadium

Saturday
6 Feb

12:30 Six Nations pub takeover: Doheny & Nesbitt

14:10 Private lounge: SCO v ITA & FRA v WAL

Evening Dinner & drinks with Geordan and the group

Sunday
7 Feb

Morning Free time in Dublin at leisure

11:00 Private jet departure, return to Stansted

Brand Partnership Opportunities

Jet & Terminal Branding

Branded headrests, welcome cards, and livery options. Your brand is the first and last thing guests see.

Pre-Match Hosting

Co-host the pre-match Q&A with Geordan. Name on all communications and event collateral.

Digital & Social

Co-branded content across all channels, with exclusive behind-the-scenes footage from the full trip.

Private Dinner Sponsorship

Brand your table at FIRE Steakhouse. 50+ HNW guests, an intimate room, Geordan at the head of the table.

"It was wonderful to have so many gorgeous experiences, with everything so thoughtfully planned, while knowing that it was part of doing some good, and showing support."
Amy — Rome Guest, February 2026
Supporting the Matt Hampson Foundation

Get Busy Living

This weekend proudly raises funds for the Matt Hampson Foundation, providing vital MND support services and the Get Busy Living Centre. The Rome trip raised £35,000 across two charities. Dublin targets £20,000 for the Foundation.
